attacking_style: Insufficient data to determine attacking patterns. Historical pedigree suggests classics-style late race moves, but 2019 observations show pure domestique role without personal offensive action.
team_tactics: EF Education First deployed him in full support capacity, protecting designated leader in final 14km rather than positioning him for personal result opportunities.
terrain_preference: World-class classics credentials suggest aptitude for cobbled sectors and arduous one-day terrain, though 2019 observations lack evidence of him exploiting preferred features.
vulnerability: Team and self-assessment indicated diminished threat level compared to podium-finishing years, relegated to gregario duties despite Monument pedigree.
key_patterns: Assigned pure domestique duties despite world-class classics palmares, signaling career trajectory shift.
Protected teammate through critical final kilometers rather than preserving own chances.
Team tactical decisions reflected diminished status from previous podium contender role.
form_trajectory: negative: Deployed as full domestique rather than co-leader despite ex-podium Monument credentials, suggesting EF viewed his winning capacity as compromised
